title: Build Bureau frontier reader preview gate
goal: Add a Bureau read-only reader that validates Cabinet Frontier records and produces preview/review/receipt evidence without importing tasks.

metadata.safety_boundary: gated design and registration only; no dispatch, merge, runtime mutation, credential exposure or automatic queue mutation
metadata.outcome: Bureau PR #197 added bureau-cabinet-frontier-reader for Cabinet Frontier JSONL. The reader classifies candidates read-only, blocks invalid/high-risk/effect-enabled/collision-prone candidates, and produces proposal-only preview, review gate and review receipt with all effect flags false. Existing cabinet_bridge and cabinet_promotion_write paths remain untouched.

verified_acceptance.reader-readonly: src/bureau/cabinet_frontier_reader.py reads Cabinet Frontier JSONL and returns cabinet_frontier_reader_report with importAllowed, dispatchAllowed, queueMutationAllowed and taskCreationAllowed false.
verified_acceptance.review-checks: Reader checks target repository/organ, risk, evidence, acceptance, duplicate/collision state and forbidden/effect flags.
verified_acceptance.receipt-non-effects: Preview, review gate and receipt keep importAllowed, dispatchAllowed, queueMutationAllowed and taskCreationAllowed false.
verified_acceptance.invalid-blocks: Tests cover high-risk candidates, effect-enabled candidates, blocked preview, and existing registry collision.
verified_acceptance.existing-bridge-surface: Existing cabinet_bridge*, cabinet_bridge_preview/review/receipt and cabinet_promotion_write paths were not replaced or modified; new reader is explicitly separate for Cabinet Frontier JSONL.

checks: Bureau PR #197 validate (3.10) SUCCESS before merge
Bureau PR #197 validate (3.12) SUCCESS before merge
local: ruff check src tests pyproject.toml OK
local: cabinet bridge focused regression tests OK

acceptance.assertion: The reader accepts only schema-valid Cabinet Frontier records and performs no registry mutation.
Review checks target repo, evidence, risk, acceptance, collision risk and forbidden effect flags.
Receipt records importAllowed, dispatchAllowed, queueMutationAllowed and taskCreationAllowed as false for this phase.
Invalid, ambiguous or high-risk candidates are blocked with a reason.

Implementation accounts for src/bureau/cabinet_bridge.py, cabinet_bridge_preview.py, cabinet_bridge_review.py, cabinet_bridge_receipt.py and cabinet_promotion_write.py before adding or changing a Cabinet reader path.
